sleeve_congress.buy_signal: New politician BUY disclosure published since last run

managers.name: Pershing Square (Bill Ackman)
managers.resolution_note: Found in 13f.info/managers/p index; direct URL 404 - will retry next Monday

sleeve_smart_money.initialization: On first smart-money run: copy each manager's current top 3 holdings, $2,000 each
sleeve_smart_money.buy_signal: New quarterly 13F shows a NEW position or an existing position increased >25% -> buy $2,000 (max 10 buys per new filing)
sleeve_smart_money.sell_signal: New quarterly 13F shows manager fully exited a ticker held in this sleeve -> close full position
